articles.title: United States Oil Fund LP Options Spot-On: On May 11th, 200.65K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.01 Million Open Interest
articles.summary: On May 11th, the United States Oil Fund LP (USO.US) saw significant options trading activity, with 200.65K contracts traded, and put options slightly outweighing call options. The open interest for USO reached approximately 2.01 million contracts, representing a 106.92% increase from the 30-day average. The most notable activity included a call option with a strike price of $157.00 expiring on June 18th, 2026, which traded 3,600 contracts.

articles.title: Argus Lifts PT on Caterpillar Inc. (CAT), Expects Strong Demand
articles.summary: Argus has raised its price target on Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) to $990 from $820, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong demand for their power generation products and construction equipment, driven by data center growth. DA Davidson also increased their price target to $845 after Caterpillar reported better-than-expected Q1 results and raised its outlook for large engine capacity growth. The company is seeing robust demand in oil & gas and expects these growth trends to continue.

articles.title: Ternium Shareholders Approve 2025 Accounts, $2.20 Dividend and Board Slate at May 12 AGM
articles.summary: Ternium S.A. shareholders approved the company's 2025 financial statements and authorized a total annual dividend of $2.20 per ADS at their May 12, 2026 Annual General Meeting. A remaining net dividend of $1.30 per ADS is scheduled for payment on May 15, 2026. The board of directors, including Chairman Paolo Rocca, Vice-Chairman Daniel Agustín Novegil, and CEO Máximo Vedoya, were re-elected, and PricewaterhouseCoopers was reappointed as auditor, ensuring leadership continuity.
articles.content: Ternium S.A. shareholders approved the company's 2025 financial statements and authorized a total annual dividend of $2.20 per ADS at their May 12, 2026 Annual General Meeting. A remaining net dividend of $1.30 per ADS is scheduled for payment on May 15, 2026. The board of directors, including Chairman Paolo Rocca, Vice-Chairman Daniel Agustín Novegil, and CEO Máximo Vedoya, were re-elected, and PricewaterhouseCoopers was reappointed as auditor, ensuring leadership continuity.

articles.title: Evergy has ground breaking on Sumner County natural gas plant today… completion is expected in 2029
articles.summary: Evergy has commenced construction on the Chisholm Trail Energy Center, a new 710-megawatt combined-cycle natural gas plant in Sumner County, Kansas, with operations expected to begin in 2029. This project is a significant infrastructure investment, promising job creation, substantial tax revenue, and crucial energy reliability and affordability for the region. It represents the first new baseload power plant in Evergy's Kansas generation fleet in over 40 years and is part of a larger plan to add over 4,000 MW of generation in the next seven years.
articles.content: Evergy has commenced construction on the Chisholm Trail Energy Center, a new 710-megawatt combined-cycle natural gas plant in Sumner County, Kansas, with operations expected to begin in 2029. This project is a significant infrastructure investment, promising job creation, substantial tax revenue, and crucial energy reliability and affordability for the region. It represents the first new baseload power plant in Evergy's Kansas generation fleet in over 40 years and is part of a larger plan to add over 4,000 MW of generation in the next seven years.

articles.title: Citi Says Broadcom (AVGO) Could Beat April Quarter Estimates on AI Strength
articles.summary: Citi analyst Atif Malik raised Broadcom's price target to $500 from $475, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong AI demand, which could lead Broadcom to exceed April quarter estimates. Broadcom is reportedly engaged with three additional customers for custom AI chips, in addition to existing agreements with major tech companies, boosting optimism for future earnings and gross margins.
articles.content: Citi analyst Atif Malik raised Broadcom's price target to $500 from $475, maintaining a Buy rating due to strong AI demand, which could lead Broadcom to exceed April quarter estimates. Broadcom is reportedly engaged with three additional customers for custom AI chips, in addition to existing agreements with major tech companies, boosting optimism for future earnings and gross margins.

articles.title: UBS Says McKesson’s (MCK) FY27 Outlook Looks “Good Enough” After Q4
articles.summary: UBS analyst Kevin Caliendo raised the price target for McKesson Corporation (MCK) to $1,050 from $1,000, reiterating a Buy rating despite a "messy" Q4 print, citing a "good enough" FY27 outlook. BofA analyst Allen Lutz, however, lowered McKesson's price target to $900 from $1,000 due to multiple contractions across peers, although he viewed the FY27 guidance as positive. McKesson reported 18% growth in adjusted earnings per diluted share for fiscal 2026 and returned $5.1 billion to shareholders, highlighting strength in specialty medications and patient support efforts.
articles.content: UBS analyst Kevin Caliendo raised the price target for McKesson Corporation (MCK) to $1,050 from $1,000, reiterating a Buy rating despite a "messy" Q4 print, citing a "good enough" FY27 outlook. BofA analyst Allen Lutz, however, lowered McKesson's price target to $900 from $1,000 due to multiple contractions across peers, although he viewed the FY27 guidance as positive. McKesson reported 18% growth in adjusted earnings per diluted share for fiscal 2026 and returned $5.1 billion to shareholders, highlighting strength in specialty medications and patient support efforts.

articles.title: [Form 4] W.W. GRAINGER, INC. Insider Trading Activity
articles.summary: A Form 4 filing reports insider trading activity for W.W. GRAINGER, INC. (GWW) involving Director Katherine D. Jaspon. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment, documenting the gifting of 576 Deferred Stock Units across two transactions. These units are expected to settle into shares on a one-for-one basis after her service as a director, with some shares held in a family trust.

articles.title: SLB prices $2.0bn of guaranteed senior notes across 2031, 2033 and 2036 maturities
articles.summary: SLB has issued $2.0 billion of guaranteed senior notes, including $500 million of 4.550% notes due 2031, $500 million of 4.800% notes due 2033, and $1.0 billion of 5.150% notes due 2036. The notes are fully guaranteed by SLB and were sold under a Form S-3 registration statement, with J.P. Morgan, HSBC, and Standard Chartered serving as lead representatives. The offering documents, including the prospectus supplement and indenture exhibits, have been filed with the SEC.
